name: riverty-playwright-bdd
description: Generic BDD-only Playwright framework for API and UI automation

scripts.bdd:gen: npm run bdd:gen:api && npm run bdd:gen:ui
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:api: npm run bdd:gen:api && playwright test -c playwright.api.config.ts --project=api
scripts.test:api:runner: npm run bdd:gen:api && playwright test -c playwright.api.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:api:smoke: npm run bdd:gen:api && playwright test -c playwright.api.config.ts --project=api --grep "@smoke"
scripts.test:api:feature: npm run bdd:gen:api && playwright test -c playwright.api.config.ts --project=api --pass-with-no-tests --grep
scripts.test:ui: npm run bdd:gen:ui && playwright test -c playwright.ui.config.ts --project=ui
scripts.test:ui:runner: npm run bdd:gen:ui && playwright test -c playwright.ui.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:ui:smoke: npm run bdd:gen:ui && playwright test -c playwright.ui.config.ts --project=ui --grep "@smoke"
scripts.test:ui:feature: npm run bdd:gen:ui && playwright test -c playwright.ui.config.ts --project=ui --pass-with-no-tests --grep
scripts.report: npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
